params.name: Civil War Premonition
params.description:
On Feb 4, 1936 AD, Dali completed this profound allegorical oil painting.
A year before Guernica was bombed, the painter Dalí keenly sensed the atmosphere of war and began working on this oil painting. The artist depicted fragmented and intertwined bodies, forming the frame structure that fills the entire canvas, symbolizing the horror and bloodshed of war. The blue sky and white clouds in the background provide a stark contrast, emphasizing that these atrocities occur even in broad daylight. …
